project.name: Global Trade Treasury
project.description: Global Trade Treasury MVP handling business client onboarding, digital accounts, settlement obligations, reservations, payment execution via Circle, liquidity rebalancing, and reconciliation.

nodes.name: Client Onboarding
nodes.summary: Handles registration, document submission, and state transitions of business clients onboarding onto the trade treasury platform.

businessRules: Clients must provide legalName and country
Onboarding starts in draft and progresses to submitted then approved or restricted/closed
crossDomainInteractions: Associates new business clients with Circle client entity IDs

nodes.name: Digital Accounts
nodes.summary: Manages accounts of digital asset (ADA) representing USDC holdings, including balance categorization and Circle sub-account provisioning.

businessRules: Every ADA has associated availability, pending, reserved, and locked balances
USDC balances are tracked in minor units (bigint)
crossDomainInteractions: Triggers Circle account provisioning for sub-account tracking

nodes.name: Settlement Obligations
nodes.summary: Models buyer-supplier trade liabilities, supporting disputes and cash reservations to secure upcoming settlements.

businessRules: Obligations can be disputed to lock a portion of minor units
Funding reservation locks available balance into reserved balance
crossDomainInteractions: Uses digital account balances to secure trade obligations

nodes.name: Payment Execution
nodes.summary: Executes internal and external crypto/USDC payments via Circle APIs and handles fiat wire redemptions.

businessRules: Payments are submitted idempotently using unique hashes
External wire redemptions require active validated wire bank details
crossDomainInteractions: Interacts with Circle APIs for ledger settlement sync

nodes.name: Treasury Ledger
nodes.summary: Provides double-entry accounting ledger system, keeping record of transaction journals, daily closes, and trial balances.

businessRules: All journal entries must balance debits and credits
Reversals create opposite journal entries linking back to the original
crossDomainInteractions: Applies journal entries directly to update Digital Account balances

nodes.name: Reconciliation & Operations
nodes.summary: Detects balance discrepancies between ledger and Circle, manages breaks, and performs liquidity rebalancing.

businessRules: Reconciles digital account ledger balances with Circle adapter balances
Rebalance recommendations trigger internal transfers to cover account shortfalls
crossDomainInteractions: Verifies external Circle balances and matches with internal ledger

nodes.name: Client Signup & Onboarding
nodes.summary: Initiating a business client profile, submitting onboarding docs to Circle, and approving the account.

nodes.name: Create Client Draft
nodes.summary: Inserts a new business client in draft status into the database store.

nodes.name: Submit Onboarding to Circle
nodes.summary: Triggers Circle adapter onboarding application call, assigning a providerReferenceId.

nodes.name: Map Circle credentials
nodes.summary: Saves client entities and flags the client onboarding status as approved.

nodes.name: Provision Digital Account
nodes.summary: Creating an Account of Digital Asset (ADA) and provisioning sub-accounts in Circle.

nodes.name: Create ADA Record
nodes.summary: Creates account mapping entry and initializes zero-balance tracking.

nodes.name: Provision Circle Wallet
nodes.summary: Calls Circle API to configure and map a sub-account/wallet ID.

nodes.name: Create & Manage Obligation
nodes.summary: Drafting trade obligations, approving them, or handling disputes.

nodes.name: Draft Obligation
nodes.summary: Creates a settlement obligation outlining buyer, supplier, and dueDate.

nodes.name: Manage Dispute/Approval
nodes.summary: Allows operators to approve, dispute, or cancel trade obligations.

nodes.name: Reserve Settlement Funds
nodes.summary: Securing funds from an active digital account balance to back a trade obligation.

nodes.name: Verify Available Balance
nodes.summary: Ensures the selected digital account has enough available USDC minor units.

nodes.name: Move to Reserved Balance
nodes.summary: Decreases available USDC units and increases reserved USDC units.

nodes.name: Emit Activated Event
nodes.summary: Pushes funding_reservation.activated event to the outbox queue.

nodes.name: Execute USDC Payment
nodes.summary: Transferring USDC tokens internally or externally via the Circle integration adapter.

nodes.name: Create Payment Record
nodes.summary: Creates a payment entry capturing source, destination, and minor units.

nodes.name: Invoke Circle Adapter
nodes.summary: Submits the transfer to Circle's API with an idempotency key.

nodes.name: Complete & Emit Status
nodes.summary: Sets payment status and emits a payment completion outbox event.

nodes.name: Post double-entry journal
nodes.summary: Submitting a new journal transaction entry and recording balanced debits and credits.

nodes.name: Verify Balanced Journals
nodes.summary: Ensures total debit units equal total credit units on the journal entries.

nodes.name: Save and Update Balances
nodes.summary: Saves journal entry and increases available balance on the linked digital account.

nodes.name: Emit Posted Event
nodes.summary: Emits treasury.journal_entry.posted event to notify ledger subscribers.

nodes.name: Run Reconciliation
nodes.summary: Analyzing ledger versus external Circle balances and managing breaks.

nodes.name: Compare Balances
nodes.summary: Retrieves current balances from local ledger and Circle API, matching discrepancies.

nodes.name: Manage Reconciliation Break
nodes.summary: Allows operators to assign, comment on, and resolve specific reconciliation breaks.

nodes.name: Manage Liquidity Rebalancing
nodes.summary: Recommending and executing internal rebalance transfers when digital accounts drop below target thresholds.

nodes.name: Recommend Rebalance
nodes.summary: Calculates digital account shortfalls and recommends transfers from deployable sources.

nodes.name: Approve and Execute Rebalance
nodes.summary: Queues rebalance instruction, requires approval if over threshold, and changes status to executed.

edges.description: Provides onboarded business clients required to open an account of digital asset.
Provides available balances that can be reserved for settlement obligations.
Triggers payment transfers to settle obligations when reservations are released.
Posts double-entry journal records of payment executions into the ledger.
Recommends rebalance transfers executed through internal payments.
